evals.prompt: Create a new Nuxt app from scratch for an internal analytics dashboard using @nuxt/ui. I want the right workflow, not just a random scaffold.
evals.expected_output: Routes through product or stack clarification as needed, uses frontend-project-orchestrator as the entry point, selects brainstorming when the product direction is underspecified, then hands off to frontend-scaffolder, nuxt-ui, and verification-oriented skills only as needed.

evals.prompt: Scaffold me a React app with Tailwind, TypeScript, and shadcn/ui. I mainly need the project setup done cleanly.
evals.expected_output: Recognizes this as a pure scaffolding request, skips unnecessary brainstorming and writing-plans, routes to frontend-scaffolder, then shadcn, and finishes with appropriate verification.

evals.prompt: I already have a frontend repo. Add a new onboarding flow for first-time users.
evals.expected_output: Avoids using frontend-project-orchestrator as the main workflow because this is not a fresh project request, and instead routes toward brainstorming and onboard-oriented implementation flow.
